name: case01_basic_06_tab_header_job
description: Case 01 Variant 06: Space-padded fixed-width, header. Reads as single column, splits by multiple spaces, casts types.
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - 06_H_Tab (space-padded)","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"value","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case01_basic/case01_basic_20260408_06_H_Tab.txt"],"QuoteChar":"disabled","Recurse":false,"Separator":"tab","WithHeader":false,"SkipFirst":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SparkSQL - Split by spaces and Transform","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"ID","Type":"bigint"},{"Name":"PREFIX","Type":"string"},{"Name":"FNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"LNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"AGE","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"BALANCE","Type":"decimal(18,2)"},{"Name":"VERSION_DATE","Type":"date"},{"Name":"ETL_UPDATE_DATE","Type":"timestamp"}]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[0]) AS BIGINT) AS ID, TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[1]) AS PREFIX, TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[2]) AS FNAME, TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[3]) AS LNAME, CAST(TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[4]) AS SMALLINT) AS AGE, CAST(TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[5]) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BALANCE, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE TRIM(SPLIT(value, '  +')[0]) RLIKE '^[0-9]+$'"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case01_basic/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
